race.comment: DIFRONZO (2) is first-up here but showed enough when last in work to warrant consideration in a race like this. A must for the exotics players. SOVEREIGN BLUE (4) son of Frankel from Benitoite on debut. Among the placings in a recent trial. Profiles well and a bold run is expected. Check for any betting moves. MARTINDALE KID (1) four-year-old gelding on debut. Has trialled well enough heading into this to suggest a bold run is likely. Watch for any market confidence. MOSHULU SPIRIT (13) is resuming from a break. Placed in a recent Deagon trial. Raced just once last campaign and finished seventh at Eagle Farm over 1200m. Finds a suitable race and can break through.
